header.title: Auto Discovery
header.description: Automatically scans your network to find all compatible cameras. This method uses network protocols to detect devices without requiring manual configuration.

scan.title: Network Scan
scan.description: Searches your local network for devices

quick.title: Quick & Easy
quick.description: Discover all cameras on your network in seconds without manual configuration.

reliable.title: Reliable
reliable.description: Uses standard protocols to ensure accurate device detection and connection.

action.hint: Searching for cameras on your network. This may take a few moments...

header.title: Manual Discovery
header.description: Manually add cameras by entering their network details. Use this when auto discovery doesn't work or when cameras are on a different network.

whenToUse.title: When to Use Manual Discovery
items: The camera is on a different subnet or network
Auto discovery is blocked by firewall settings
You already know the camera's IP address and credentials

manualDiscovery.note: Recording and snapshot options can be configured after the camera is successfully registered.

errors.invalidIp: Please enter a valid IP address.
errors.invalidPort: Please enter a valid port number (0-65535).
